label: Adversarial examples & adversarial training

node.label: Adversarial examples & adversarial training
node.definition: Inputs or opponents are deliberately optimized to expose and reduce model vulnerabilities.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Adversarial examples & adversarial training is modeled as depending on Adversarial minimax objectives, Optimization theory and feeding downstream nodes such as Generative adversarial networks, Adversarial robustness & security testing.
examples: atlas downstream link to Generative adversarial networks

limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Adversarial minimax objectives, Optimization theory.
